input.name: csrf_token
input.t-nocache: The csrf token must always be up to date.

input.name: csrf_token
input.t-nocache: The csrf token must always be up to date.

a.class: btn btn-link float-end p-0 js_edit_rental_address no-decoration
a.title: Edit this address

div.p:
You are editing your billing and shipping addresses at the same time!
If you want to modify your shipping address, create a new address.

t.t-value: 'vat' in checkout and checkout['vat'] and not can_edit_vat

t.t-if: mode == ('new', 'billing') or (mode == ('edit', 'billing') and (can_edit_vat or 'vat' in checkout and checkout['vat']))

div.label: Company Name

input.name: company_name
input.t-att-value: 'commercial_company_name' in checkout and checkout['commercial_company_name'] or 'company_name' in checkout and checkout['company_name']

div.small: Changing company name is not allowed once document(s) have been issued for your account. Please contact us directly for this operation.

div.t-attf-class: mb-3 #{error.get('vat') and 'o_has_error' or ''} col-lg-6 div_vat mb-0
div.label: TIN / VAT
div.small: Changing VAT number is not allowed once document(s) have been issued for your account. Please contact us directly for this operation.
Changing company name or VAT number is not allowed once document(s) have been issued for your account. Please contact us directly for this operation.

t.t-value: country and [x for x in country.get_address_fields() if x in ["zip", "city"]] or ["city", "zip"]

div.t-att-style: (not country or not country.state_ids) and 'display: none'
div.label: State / Province

option.t-att-selected: s.id == ('state_id' in checkout and country and checkout['state_id'] != '' and int(checkout['state_id']))

div.label:
Ship to the same address
 (Your shipping address will be requested later)

input.name: csrf_token
input.t-nocache: The csrf token must always be up to date.

a.class: btn btn-primary mb32 a-submit a-submit-disable a-submit-loading

div.strong: No suitable payment option could be found.
div.div: If you believe that it is an error, please contact the website administrator.

div.title: Stripe Connect is not available in your country, please use another payment provider.

input.name: csrf_token
input.t-nocache: The csrf token must always be up to date.

div.h2:
Thank you for your order.
Print

t.p:
Sign Up
to follow your order.

div.t-attf-class: card #{(tx_sudo.state == 'pending' and 'bg-info') or (tx_sudo.state == 'done' and order.amount_total == tx_sudo.amount and 'alert-success') or (tx_sudo.state == 'done' and order.amount_total != tx_sudo.amount and 'bg-warning') or (tx_sudo.state == 'authorized' and 'alert-success') or 'bg-danger'}

t.span: Unfortunately your order can not be confirmed as the amount of your payment does not match the amount of your cart. Please contact the responsible of the shop for more information.

div.h3: Or scan me with your banking app.
